items.title: City intelligence operating model Initiative
items.description: City intelligence operating model Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Policy experiment decision cycle and Public-sector platform ARR, anchored in multimodal interoperability, ticketing consistency, and settlement clarity across city partners and led through City Mobility Intelligence with common planning metrics across parking and transport.. The quarter concentrates on account-based ticketing, multimodal settlement, and partner interoperability across urban mobility systems so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease policy experiment decision cycle by improving city mobility intelligence with common planning metrics across parking and transport and removing avoidable workflow friction.
Decrease average parking search time by improving city mobility intelligence with common planning metrics across parking and transport and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase public-sector platform arr by strengthening city mobility intelligence with common planning metrics across parking and transport and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended City Mobility Intelligence with common planning metrics across parking and transport.
Extended Planning, Scenario & Outcome Modeling with faster intervention and outcome comparison.
Extended Operational Data, KPI & Analytics Platform with reusable city KPI packs.
Extended Enterprise Integration Layer with reusable city-system ingestion patterns.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced shared policy, curb, and mobility dashboards in City Mobility Insight Board.
Introduced cleaner planning-data access in Mobility Intelligence Data API.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: City intelligence operating model: operating discovery

items.title: Parking control tower convergence Initiative
items.description: Parking control tower convergence Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Receipts per employee and Business and fleet ARR, anchored in multimodal interoperability, ticketing consistency, and settlement clarity across city partners and led through Parking Configuration & Policy Management with reusable tariff and permit models.. The quarter concentrates on account-based ticketing, multimodal settlement, and partner interoperability across urban mobility systems so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase receipts per employee by strengthening parking configuration & policy management with reusable tariff and permit models and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase policy exception rate by strengthening parking configuration & policy management with reusable tariff and permit models and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase business and fleet arr by strengthening parking configuration & policy management with reusable tariff and permit models and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Parking Configuration & Policy Management with reusable tariff and permit models.
Extended Payment Channel Orchestration with cleaner consistency rules across mobile, kiosk, and partner channels.
Extended Access, Permit & LPR Control with stronger event handling and permit validation.
Extended Enforcement & Compliance Workflows with better citation evidence and exception routing.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced consolidated policy and enforcement workflows in Operator Control Console.
Introduced cross-channel yield and compliance tracking in Parking KPI Cockpit.
Introduced rule-consistent payment and access behaviors in Parking Operations API.
